_title: FIFA tournament — admin mock setup & result submission (WARZONE.GG)
prerequisites: Apply warzongg-api/sql/fifa_tournament_engine.sql in Supabase SQL Editor (optional columns + fifa_scoring_config).
API running (e.g. localhost:3000) and js/config.js WZ_API_URL pointing at it.
One admin account (Admin panel) and at least two approved teams registered for the tournament (captain flow). Admins cannot register teams; use captain accounts or seed registrations in Supabase.
Replace every PLACEHOLDER_* below with real UUIDs from Table Editor or GET /api/tournaments, /api/teams, /api/registrations.
why_engine_triggers: The FIFA engine runs when the tournament row has 'fifa' in type OR mode (case-insensitive). The admin Create Tournament form sets mode = '<Game Title> · <Division label>', so choose Game Title = FIFA.

fields.Tournament Structure: solo or ranked (any; engine keys off FIFA in mode)

step_1_create_tournament_admin_ui.result: mode stored as 'FIFA · 1v1 Ultimate Team — Group + Knockout' → contains 'fifa' → FIFA engine active for all matches in this tournament.

body.name: FIFA Winter Cup 2026 — Mock
body.description: Mock FIFA cup — goals as score_a/score_b; group draws allowed; knockout needs ET/PEN or admin winner.

step_1b_create_tournament_rest.capture: Save returned tournament id as TOURNAMENT_ID.

step_2_registrations: Captains: pages/register.html or POST /api/registrations with tournament_id = TOURNAMENT_ID (two different teams minimum).
Admin: pages/admin.html → Participants → select tournament → set each registration status to approved (PATCH /api/registrations/:id/status).

step_3_schedule_matches_admin_ui.navigate: Admin → Matches → Create Match For Tournament
step_3_schedule_matches_admin_ui.game_strip: Click FIFA filter on the game strip so only FIFA tournaments appear in dropdowns.

per_match.Round: group_stage for group fixtures; quarter_final / semi_final / grand_final for KO
per_match.Leave scores empty on create: Admin UI always creates as scheduled with null scores; enter results in Update panel.

step_4_submit_results_admin_ui.navigate: Admin → Matches → Update Stats Match For Tournament

fields.Round: Must stay group_stage for group fixtures (leaderboard only counts group_stage for FIFA)
fields.COD engine stats JSON: For FIFA optional extras use JSON object with fifa key, e.g. penalties — see step_4b

group_draw_bravo_vs_charlie.expect: 200; winner_id null; is_draw; both get +1 point in tournament leaderboard

knockout_quarter_after_1_1.expect: 200; winner team A on penalties; does NOT affect FIFA group leaderboard (round !== group_stage)

knockout_fail_without_resolution.expect: 400 incomplete — must add ET/PEN or admin_winner_team_id

expected_group_mini_table_after_three_ro._scenario: Alpha beats Bravo 3-1; Alpha draws Charlie 2-2; Bravo beats Charlie 1-0
expected_group_mini_table_after_three_ro.points_rules: Win 3, draw 1, loss 0; sort by points, then goal difference, then goals for
expected_group_mini_table_after_three_ro.expected_order_hint: Alpha first (highest points), then order by GD/GF — verify with GET leaderboard below

api_leaderboard_tournament_scoped.expect: Each team has points, wins, losses, draws, goals_for, goals_against, goal_difference for FIFA; only group_stage matches counted.

api_matches.expect: Completed rows show score_a/score_b; winner_id set except draws; stats.fifa resolution metadata after PATCH.

page_leaderboard_html.url: pages/leaderboard.html — pick game FIFA / your tournament in filters
page_leaderboard_html.expect: Rows and ranks align with API (same recomputation rules).

page_tournaments_html.url: pages/tournaments.html — open tournament card → completed fixtures show scores
page_tournaments_html.expect: View Result shows same goals as API.

page_schedule_html.expect: Match appears in date group with status completed when set.

page_bracket_html.expect: Matches list uses score_a/score_b; KO fixtures appear when loaded for that tournament.

page_admin_html.url: pages/admin.html — Overview match status + Match history table
page_admin_html.expect: Scores and winner direction (bold) match public API.

notes: Global teams.wins/points are NOT updated for FIFA tournaments (only COD-style global tally); tournament view is authoritative.
If leaderboard looks empty, ensure registrations are approved and matches are status completed with both scores.
Head-to-head tie-break is not yet applied in /api/leaderboard — GD then GF are used.
